title: T-007 — SET-004 First Location Step UI
prompt:
Implement the SET-004 First Location Step page at `/onboarding/3` per PRD §14.3 step 3 + §14.4 SET-004. Form fields: `zone` (text 2-40), `bin` (text 2-40) — both within the warehouse created in step 2 (warehouse_id read from server-side session/state).

Submit calls stub `createLocation` then advances state to step 4. No Skip button.

RED: `pnpm --filter web test -- onboarding-step3`.

pipeline_inputs.description: Step 3 form: zone + bin within step-2 warehouse; advances to step 4.
pipeline_inputs.details: Same pattern as T-005/T-006. ltree path enhancement is gap-backlog scope and explicitly excluded here.
acceptance_criteria: Given empty submit, when triggered, then 2 required-field errors shown and no state mutation.
Given valid zone+bin, when submitted, then updateOnboardingState({current_step:4, completed_steps:[...,3]}) AND router.push('/onboarding/4') fire.
Given warehouse_id missing from state, when page renders, then it redirects back to /onboarding/2 (precondition violated).
Given vitest covers above, when pnpm --filter web test runs, then 0 failures.
risk_red_lines: Do not allow step 3 access if step 2 was not completed.
